source.detail: Homolytic bond dissociation energy BDE = E(A.) + E(B.) - E(A-B) of ethanol (CCO) bond C(1)-O(2) from the AtomisticSkills chem-bond-dissociation example (.agents/skills/chem-bond-dissociation/examples/ethanol_mace_off23_small/bde_results.json), MACE-OFF23-small; rdkit fragments the bond, the MLIP supplies the fragment energies
